zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Belton於1439年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可時，她的父親Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton31歲，母親Anna de Montgomery44歲。她於大約1468年與Sir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yester結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1529年12月7日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾也斯特也斯特 卡素享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Belton于1439年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安波爾維其可时，她的父亲Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton31岁，母亲Anna de Montgomery44岁。她于大约1468年与Sir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yester结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1529年12月7日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾也斯特也斯特 卡素享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Belton was born in 1439, in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton, was 31 and her mother, Anna de Montgomery, was 44. She married Sir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yester about 1468. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 7 December 1529, in Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Belton est née en 1439, à Borthwick, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Anna de Montgomery, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yester environ 1468. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 décembre 1529, à Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Belton 1439 in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton 31 und ihre Mutter Anna de Montgomery 44. Sie hat um 1468 Sir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Dezember 1529 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Beltonが1439年にスコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィックで生まれた時，父Sir George Cunningham Lord of Beltonは31歳，母Anna de Montgomeryは44歳であった。約1468年にSir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1529年12月7日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアイエスターイエスター カストルで90歳で死去した。

ko.Gifford, East Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 예스터 지퍼드

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Belton(이)가 1439년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna de Montgomery(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1468년 Sir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 12월 7일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 예스터 예스터 카스틀에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Belton nasceu em 1439, em Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Anna de Montgomery, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yester aproximadamente 1468. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1529, em Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 90 anos.

ru.Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland,: гиффорд, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Belton родилась в 1439 г. в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Anna de Montgomery, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yester около 1468 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 7 декабря 1529 г. в местности иестир кастл, иестир, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 90 лет.

es.Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland,: Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Cunningham of Belton nació en 1439, en Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Anna de Montgomery, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Sir John Hay of Lochorwart and Yester, latterly Wester Hoprew - 1st Lord Hay of Yester aproximadamente 1468. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1529, en Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 90 años.
